ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_home" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "team_away" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Specific venue where the game is played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to these statistics */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team whose stats are recorded */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage for the team */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage for the team */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage for the team */,
  "ast" REAL /* Total assists by the team */,
  "reb" REAL /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "oreb" REAL /* Offensive rebounds by the team */,
  "def_reb" REAL /* Defensive rebounds by the team */,
  "steals" REAL /* Total steals by the team */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Total blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Total turnovers by the team */,
  "fouls" REAL /* Total fouls committed by the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game, measured in possessions per 48 minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_name FOREIGN KEY ("team_name") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season's stats */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team for which stats are recorded */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team in the season */,
  "avg_fg_pct" REAL /* Average field goal percentage for the season */,
  "avg_ft_pct" REAL /* Average free throw percentage for the season */,
  "avg_ast" REAL /* Average assists per game for the season */,
  "avg_reb" REAL /* Average rebounds per game for the season */,
  "avg_def_reb" REAL /* Average defensive rebounds per game for the season */,
  "avg_steals" REAL /* Average steals per game for the season */,
  "avg_blocks" REAL /* Average blocks per game for the season */,
  "avg_turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers per game for the season */,
  "avg_fouls" REAL /* Average fouls per game for the season */,
  "pace_rating" REAL /* Average pace rating for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_name FOREIGN KEY ("team_name") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the team's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in inches or centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in pounds or kilograms */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stats are related to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose stats are recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds grabbed by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
